sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n75789" key="ou)dostisou=n" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">οὐδοστισοῦν</orth>, neut. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">οὐδοτιοῦν</foreign>, <sense id="n75789.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὅστις</ref> </xr> IV. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0012.tlg002.perseus-grc1:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
